scripts.lint: pnpm -w lint testsuite/tests; pnpm -w lint testsuite/src
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm -w lint:fix testsuite/tests; pnpm -w lint:fix testsuite/src
scripts.format: pnpm -w format testsuite/tests; pnpm -w format testsuite/src
scripts.format:fix: pnpm -w format:fix testsuite/tests; pnpm -w format:fix testsuite/src
